title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) is presented as a framework for building reliable multi-agent systems with state management, routing, and guardrails. The video demonstrates using ADK to automate M365 to Google Workspace migrations via a multi-agent architecture with sequential orchestration, self-correcting loops, context caching, and single-command production deployment via Google Agent Engine.
